title: Android MG Optimizer
description: "A very excellent mobile phone performance optimization package"
body:
---

整合包简介 | Modpack Introduction

---

中文简介

畅享丝滑，重塑体验——您的终极手机版《我的世界》性能优化整合包

厌倦了卡顿、掉帧和漫长的加载时间？本整合包专为提升《我的世界》基岩版（手机版）的游戏体验而精心打造，旨在让您的移动冒险变得如丝般顺滑！

我们深知移动设备性能各异，因此本整合包的核心目标是：在不牺牲游戏核心乐趣的前提下，最大限度地提升性能与流畅度。通过集成一系列轻量级且高效的优化模组，我们针对渲染、加载、实体管理等关键环节进行了深度调优。

主要特性与优化亮点：

· 极致性能提升： 显著减少游戏卡顿和帧率波动，即使在构建复杂的红石机器或探索茂密丛林时，也能保持流畅体验。
· 智能资源管理： 优化内存与CPU使用率，有效降低设备发热和耗电，延长您的游戏时间。
· 闪电般加载速度： 世界加载和区块生成速度大幅提升，让您更快地投入建造与探索。
· 视觉体验优化： 在保持原版画风的基础上，提供可选的视觉增强选项，如更清晰的纹理、平滑的灯光等，告别视觉瑕疵。
· 游戏体验微调： 包含一些便捷的生活质量调整，如FPS显示、更流畅的动画，让您的游戏过程更加得心应手。

适用人群：

· 追求流畅游戏体验的生存与建造玩家。
· 设备配置中等或偏低，希望摆脱卡顿困扰的玩家。
· 任何希望在手机上获得更佳《我的世界》体验的玩家。

立即安装，释放您手机的潜能，重新爱上在方寸之间畅游无限世界的乐趣！

---

English Introduction

Buttery Smooth, Reimagined Experience – Your Ultimate Minecraft PE/Bedrock Performance Optimization Modpack

Tired of lag, frame drops, and long loading times? This modpack is meticulously crafted to enhance your Minecraft: Bedrock Edition (PE) experience, making your mobile adventures as smooth as silk!

We understand the diverse performance of mobile devices. Therefore, the core mission of this modpack is to maximize performance and fluidity without sacrificing the core fun of the game. By integrating a series of lightweight and efficient optimization mods, we have performed in-depth tuning on key areas like rendering, loading, and entity management.

Key Features & Optimizations:

· Massive Performance Boost: Significantly reduces game stutters and frame rate drops, ensuring a smooth experience even when running complex redstone contraptions or exploring dense jungles.
· Smarter Resource Management: Optimizes RAM and CPU usage, effectively reducing device overheating and battery drain, extending your play sessions.
· Lightning-Fast Loading: Drastically improves world loading and chunk generation speed, getting you into building and exploration faster.
· Visual Experience Enhanced: Offers optional visual improvements like clearer textures, smooth lighting, etc., while maintaining the vanilla aesthetic, saying goodbye to visual glitches.
· Gameplay Tweaks: Includes convenient Quality-of-Life adjustments such as FPS display, smoother animations, making your gameplay more comfortable.

Who is this for?

· Survival and creative builders who demand a fluid gaming experience.
· Players with mid to low-range devices who wish to break free from lag.
· Anyone looking for a better overall Minecraft experience on their mobile phone.

Install now, unleash your phone's potential, and fall in love with exploring infinite worlds from the palm of your hand all over again!

---

重要使用提示 | Important Usage Tip:

· 请务必确保您的手机使用了 MG渲染器 以及支持该渲染器的启动器。此外，早期版本主要针对骁龙处理器进行了优化适配，在其他处理器（如联发科、三星Exynos等）上运行可能导致性能下降或负优化效果，请谨慎选择。
· English: Please ensure that your phone is using the MG Renderer and a launcher that supports it. Please note: the early versions of this modpack are primarily optimized for Snapdragon processors. Using it on other processors (like MediaTek, Samsung Exynos, etc.) may result in performance issues or negative optimization. Proceed with caution if your device does not use a Snapdragon chipset.
